metadata.description: A male-presenting individual in their 50s with olive skin and visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. The face is an oval shape with a defined jawline. Long, dark brown, tightly curled hair with significant graying at the roots and temples frames the face, extending past the shoulders. The eyes are almond-shaped and amber-brown, set slightly wide apart. Thick, dark eyebrows with some gray hairs are gently arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip. The mouth has medium-full lips, and a short, neatly trimmed gray beard and mustache cover the chin and upper lip. The person has a warm, closed-mouth smile, looking directly at the viewer with a slight head tilt.
metadata.anchor: Long, dark brown, tightly curled hair with significant graying.
